AC: Each WorkItem addresses its file findings (severity order in summary). (cd vox2stl && make test) passes on Emacs-less host. Reheader refuses or warns on cross-layer row-count mismatch. Parent ce147239 has INFO back-link; todo doctor ok.

Body.raw:
# Multi-model review follow-ups (parent ce147239)

Parent: ce147239 emacs mode for vox2stl (done). Adversarial review of branch
`ce147239-emacs-mode-vox2stl` vs master by Grok 4.5 + Opus 4.8 (parallel).

## Global context

- Rubric: transforms should keep files legal for `voxtool.py check`; `make test`
  must stay host-only (no Emacs/special infra per AGENTS.md).
- reheader contract is overpromised: per-layer height_rows fix does not imply
  cross-layer legality when layer row counts differ.
- Shell-out path (python3 + voxtool.py via call-process): no security issues;
  forward refs in Elisp are fine.
- Dismissed: call-process argv shape; indent correctly shifts right-side labels
  with the design window (prior note was inaccurate).

## Severity rollup

| Concern | Severity | Primary files |
|---------|----------|---------------|
| Emacs tests fail-not-skip in FAST_TESTS | critical | test_vox_mode_emacs.py, Makefile |
| reheader ok while check still fails | warning | voxtool.py, test_voxtool_reheader.py |
| sync-pads index pairing not label pairing | warning | voxtool.py, test_voxtool_sync_pads.py |
| indent not byte-clean for short rows | warning | voxtool.py, test_voxtool_indent.py |
| vox-mode--directory wrong fallback | warning | vox-mode.el |
| C-c C-h / font-lock comma | nit | vox-mode.el |

WorkItems.summary: vox2stl/test_vox_mode_emacs.py: CRITICAL find_emacs() must pytest.skip (not AssertionError) when no Emacs; make test must not hard-fail on Emacs-less hosts
vox2stl/Makefile: WARNING remove test_vox_mode_emacs.py from FAST_TESTS or gate make test until emacs tests skip cleanly; prefer all-tests for emacs batch gates

vox2stl/voxtool.py: WARNING reheader refuse/warn when cross-layer row counts differ (no ok while check fails); WARNING sync-pads pair by row_label or fail on mismatch; WARNING indent +1/-1 byte identity for short rows; NIT preserve/document header spacing in rewrite_layer_header_fields
vox2stl/emacs/vox-mode.el: WARNING vox-mode--directory require load-file-name (no buffer-file-name fallback); NIT rebind reheader off C-c C-h; NIT fix font-lock ([.]", 0 ...) stray comma
vox2stl/test_voxtool_reheader.py: WARNING up-side test must run check or assert clear failure when cross-layer heights stay illegal
vox2stl/test_voxtool_sync_pads.py: WARNING add swapped-row / label-pairing test once sync-pads pairs by label or errors on mismatch
vox2stl/test_voxtool_indent.py: WARNING add short-row indent +1/-1 byte-identity test (or document intentional space materialization)
